project_type: React SPA with Vite and Tailwind CSS
test_command: npm run build (no test suite - use build as validation)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to confirm no syntax/compile errors. Visually inspect the toolbar behavior if possible.
environment_constraints: Network available for npm installs. No test framework configured.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns in App.jsx.
key_patterns: Single large App.jsx file (~6200 lines). Uses Tailwind CSS for all styling. lucide-react for icons. State managed via useState hooks. All UI is inline JSX in the return statement. Fixed-position overlays use z-[80] class. Actions use takeSnapshot() before mutations for undo support.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx (lines 6000-6065 - current toolbar, lines 1-15 - imports, lines 450-455 - multi-selection state)
directory_structure: Single-page React app. src/App.jsx is the monolithic component. Other src/ files are smaller extracted components (MiniMap, PinPanel, etc).
